About Elite Roof Services

Local Roofing Professionals You Can Count On

Elite Roof Services is committed to delivering high-quality roofing services with integrity and attention to detail. We understand that your roof protects everything underneath it, which is why we focus on durable materials, skilled installation, and exceptional customer service on every project — for homeowners and businesses across New Caney, Porter, Kingwood, Conroe, Humble and The Woodlands.

  • Locally owned & operated
  • Certified & insured roofing experts
  • Free roof inspections & estimates
  • Fast turnaround, no hidden fees

What We Do

Roofing Services Built to Protect Your Property

Full-service residential and commercial roofing — from emergency repairs to complete replacements — done right the first time.

Roof Replacement

Complete roofing systems built for durability and long-term protection, installed by a licensed local crew.

Roof Repair

Fast, effective repairs for leaks, damaged shingles, and storm-related issues before they get worse.

Storm Damage Repair

Restore your roof after hail, wind, or severe Texas weather with prompt, insurance-savvy service.

Roof Inspections

Identify issues early with a thorough, honest inspection — completely free, no obligation.

Commercial Roofing

Reliable roofing systems for offices, retail properties, warehouses and commercial buildings.

Emergency Roofing

Rapid response, 24/7, when unexpected roofing problems require immediate attention.

How It Works

Our Simple, Transparent Roofing Process

Four steps from first call to a roof you can rely on.

1

Free Inspection

We assess your roof thoroughly, at no cost, and explain exactly what we find.

2

Detailed Estimate

You receive a clear, itemized estimate — no surprises, no hidden fees.

3

Professional Work

Our licensed crew completes your installation or repair on schedule.

4

Final Approval

A final walkthrough ensures every detail meets your — and our — standards.

Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to what homeowners ask us most.

How much does a new roof cost?

Pricing depends on roof size, materials, and project complexity. Contact us for a free estimate tailored to your property.

How long does roof replacement take?

Most residential projects are completed within one to three days depending on weather and roof size.

Do you help with insurance claims?

Yes. We assist homeowners throughout the insurance claims process after storm damage, from documentation to final approval.

Do you offer free inspections?

Yes — every inspection and estimate is completely free, with no obligation to move forward.

What roofing materials do you install?

Asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and clay tile, among other quality roofing systems, depending on your property's needs.
